name: Cline

form_factor.comment: VS Code extension, JetBrains plugin, CLI, and @cline/sdk for embedding the agent runtime in apps and CI. Per-form-factor links: Extension: https://marketplace.visualstudio.com/items?itemName=saoudrizwan.claude-dev; CLI: https://docs.cline.bot/cli/overview; SDK: https://docs.cline.bot/sdk/overview.

released_in.comment: Initial release was v1.0.4 on July 28, 2024 (originally named 'Claude Dev' by Saoud Rizwan). 8M+ installs by May 2026.

latest_major_update.comment: Latest release v4.0.5 (June 30, 2026) adds Claude Sonnet 5 support across Anthropic, Bedrock, Vertex, Claude Code, SAP AI Core, OpenRouter, and Vercel AI Gateway providers, including model-picker and recommended-model updates.

rules.comment: Rich rule system: .clinerules/ directory, global ~/Documents/Cline/Rules/, conditional rules with YAML frontmatter globs, auto-detection of .cursorrules, .windsurfrules, AGENTS.md. Location: no public disk folder/file location found in docs reviewed.

skills.comment: Full skill system: SKILL.md files in .cline/skills/ or ~/.cline/skills/, YAML frontmatter, progressive loading, slash command triggering, skill toggles. Location: no public disk folder/file location found in docs reviewed.

hooks.comment: Lifecycle hooks via SDK plugin system: 18 hook stages (input, runtime_event, session_start, turn_start, tool_call_before/after, etc.). Also ~/.cline/hooks/ directory.

mcp_servers.comment: Full MCP support with STDIO and HTTP/SSE transports, MCP Marketplace for one-click install, cline mcp CLI wizard. Location: no public disk folder/file location found in docs reviewed.

custom_commands.comment: Built-in slash commands plus skills auto-register as slash commands. SDK plugins can also register custom commands. Location: no public disk folder/file location found in docs reviewed.

goal_command.comment: Cline supports custom slash commands via workflow files; no built-in `/goal` for auto-continuing until a completion condition.

subagents.comment: Subagents are documented as enabled by default across VS Code, JetBrains, CLI, and other editors, with a Settings -> Features -> Agent toggle to disable the use_subagents tool.

model_selection.comment: 30+ documented providers: Anthropic, OpenAI, Google, AWS Bedrock, Azure, GCP Vertex, OpenRouter (200+ models), Ollama, LM Studio, and any OpenAI-compatible endpoint.

approval_mode.comment: Granular auto-approve per category: Read, Edit, Execute, Browser, MCP. YOLO mode for everything. --auto-approve flag.

sandbox_mode.comment: Sandbox mode via CLINE_SANDBOX env var and CLINE_SANDBOX_DATA_DIR for isolated session storage. No containerization.

resume.comment: Full session resume via --id flag. cline history lists all sessions. Checkpoints enable rollback.

continue.comment: --continue flag exists but is tied to --worktree. No standalone 'continue latest' flag. Pipe-chaining supported.

non_interactive.comment: Full headless mode. Auto-triggered with --json flag, piped stdin, or redirected stdout. Works in CI/CD.

output_format.comment: Full JSON output via --json flag. Newline-delimited JSON objects with type, text, ts, say/ask subtype, reasoning, partial.

statusline.comment: No customizable status line found in documentation or CLI reference.

telemetry.comment: Anonymous telemetry with user toggle. Never captures code/file contents. Enterprise: OpenTelemetry integration (OTLP export to Datadog/Grafana/Splunk).

custom_model_provider.comment: Any OpenAI-compatible API endpoint supported. 30+ documented providers. BYOK model.

notes: Cline has the most comprehensive feature set of any coding agent in this matrix — 17/20 fields at full support. Open source (Apache 2.0), originally 'Claude Dev'. Started as VS Code extension, expanded to CLI and SDK. 8M+ installs.

pricing.comment: Open source: free for individual developers. Pay only for AI inference. Enterprise: custom pricing with SSO/OIDC/SCIM, RBAC.

some_free_usage.comment: Cline is free for individual developers; AI inference is paid separately or BYOK/local.

no_account_required.comment: Can run with local models via Ollama or LM Studio without a Cline-hosted account.

can_use_other_subscriptions.comment: Cline documents OpenAI Codex OAuth so users can bring a ChatGPT subscription, and also supports BYOK providers.

hosted_agent.comment: Runs locally as VS Code extension or CLI.

transcripts.comment: Location: transcript/session disk storage was not found in public docs reviewed.

keyboard_shortcuts.comment: VS Code extension keybindings; customizable via VS Code settings.

theme_customization.comment: Inherits VS Code theme; limited Cline-specific customization.

auto_save.comment: Workspace auto-save settings via VS Code.

context_window.comment: Token budget and context window configurable.

git_integration.comment: VS Code git integration; full git workflow support.

ui_customization.comment: VS Code panel customization; Cline-specific UI limited.
